prompts.m3: Determine whether the imaging shows occurrences of meniscal tears? (Yes/No)
prompts.m4: What abnormality is present: [A] Fracture [B] Osteoarthritis [C] No abnormality ?
prompts.m5: Classify the orientation of the visible fracture line: [A] Transverse [B] Oblique [C] Spiral [D] Comminuted (multiple fragments) [E] No fracture present
prompts.m6: Examine the articulating joint space visible in this image, is there a significant reduction or narrowing of the joint space? [A] Yes [B] No
prompts.m7: Evaluate the morphology of the meniscus on this view. Does it demonstrate structural distortion, blunting, or a displaced fragment? [A] Yes [B] No
